# Hiyori official demo model

This directory contains the `Hiyori` sample model copied from the official Live2D Cubism Web Samples repository for local testing inside the desktop overlay.

Source:

- Repository: [Live2D/CubismWebSamples](https://github.com/Live2D/CubismWebSamples)
- Original path: `Samples/Resources/Hiyori`

Notes:

- This model is being used here as an official sample asset for integration testing.
- Real Cubism rendering still requires the official Cubism SDK for Web package from Live2D, because the Core runtime is not included in the public GitHub repository.
